title: F01 forge preview
body:
## Feature
forge preview

## Demand
Medo de mutacao errada, necessidade de entender impacto antes da acao.

## Product shape
Comando e API que mostram plano, arquivos, comandos, authority, gates, efeitos e rollback antes de aplicar.

## Evidence
P21,P22,P28,O03,C06

## Crates
forge-core-kernel, forge-core-store, forge-core-cli

## Acceptance
- Dado um OperationContract mutavel, preview retorna JSON deterministico com status, touched_refs, risk, gates, rollback_available e next_human_action.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F02 forge ready
body:
## Feature
forge ready

## Demand
Confianca operacional e validacao antes de declarar pronto.

## Product shape
Gate unificado para tests, lint, typecheck, evals, security checks e readiness report.

## Evidence
P22,P23,P30,C06

## Crates
forge-core-kernel, forge-core-validate, forge-core-cli

## Acceptance
- Um run so passa se todos os gates obrigatorios passarem; falhas retornam reasons tipadas e evidencias.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F03 TraceEvent canonico e forge explain
body:
## Feature
TraceEvent canonico e forge explain

## Demand
Saber o que aconteceu, por que aconteceu e como auditar.

## Product shape
Trace NDJSON machine-readable e explicacao humana por run.

## Evidence
P04,P07,P17,P24,P26,C06

## Crates
novo forge-core-trace, runtime, cli

## Acceptance
- Toda operacao gera trace_id, node_id, actor_agent_id, principal_id, input_refs, output_refs, decision_reason e cost.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F04 WorkflowGraph v0
body:
## Feature
WorkflowGraph v0

## Demand
Orquestrar sem routing solto por prompt.

## Product shape
Grafo declarativo com nodes, edges, budgets, verifier nodes e replan boundaries.

## Evidence
P04,P05,P06,C03,C06

## Crates
novo forge-core-graph, runtime

## Acceptance
- forge graph validate e forge graph run --dry-run funcionam sem executar efeitos; executor respeita dependencias e stop conditions.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F05 Eval Compare single-agent baseline
body:
## Feature
Eval Compare single-agent baseline

## Demand
Provar quando multi-agent vale o custo.

## Product shape
Harness para comparar single-agent anchor, graph workflow e MAS sob mesmo loader, tools, output contract e usage accounting.

## Evidence
P01,P02,P03,P07

## Crates
novo forge-core-eval

## Acceptance
- Relatorio mostra accuracy, cost, latency, trajectory length, failures e delta contra baseline.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F06 Memory Policy
body:
## Feature
Memory Policy

## Demand
Personalizacao sem memoria opaca ou perigosa.

## Product shape
Memory admission, retention, forget, promote, raw evidence e authority boundary.

## Evidence
P09,P10,P11,P28,O03

## Crates
novo forge-core-memory

## Acceptance
- Nenhuma memoria vira authority automaticamente; promote exige policy e evidencia raw.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F07 Multi-principal governance
body:
## Feature
Multi-principal governance

## Demand
Varios agentes e pessoas no mesmo estado sem overwrites silenciosos.

## Product shape
PrincipalId, IntentContract, ConflictContract, GovernancePolicy e arbitration ledger.

## Evidence
P08,P24,P25,P26,C01

## Crates
contracts, validate, runtime, store

## Acceptance
- Conflito entre principals vira objeto estruturado, nao merge manual silencioso.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F08 Secure MCP adapter
body:
## Feature
Secure MCP adapter

## Demand
Conectar ferramentas reais com seguranca.

## Product shape
MCP server para preview, ready, graph, trace, memory e effect application com allowlist e attestation.

## Evidence
O01,P17,P18,P19,P20,O03

## Crates
novo forge-core-protocol-mcp

## Acceptance
- Nenhuma tool MCP muta estado sem OperationContract e authority validada.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F09 Secure A2A adapter
body:
## Feature
Secure A2A adapter

## Demand
Interoperabilidade entre agentes de vendors diferentes.

## Product shape
A2A agent card e task surface para delegacao controlada.

## Evidence
O02,P08,P17,P19,P20

## Crates
novo forge-core-protocol-a2a

## Acceptance
- A2A nao substitui MCP nem vira subagent protocol interno; tarefa externa sempre tem PrincipalId e delegation chain.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F10 Control Plane local
body:
## Feature
Control Plane local

## Demand
Ver lanes, claims, traces, gates e risco em uma tela.

## Product shape
TUI ou HTML estatico lendo .forge-method sem SaaS obrigatorio.

## Evidence
P06,P07,P21,P28,O03,C01

## Crates
novo forge-core-ui ou cli

## Acceptance
- Mostra run status, active claims, stale claims, conflicts, gates, cost e next action.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F11 Risk Audit Gate para codigo de IA
body:
## Feature
Risk Audit Gate para codigo de IA

## Demand
Detectar fail-soft, exception swallowing, security slop e teste falso.

## Product shape
Gate com checks deterministios e extensao para SAST/linters.

## Evidence
P22,P23,P30

## Crates
validate, runtime, cli

## Acceptance
- Risk gate falha fechado em padroes proibidos e gera report com evidencia por arquivo.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F12 Guided Start e Product UX
body:
## Feature
Guided Start e Product UX

## Demand
Entrar no produto sem entender agentes, YAML ou protocolo.

## Product shape
Fluxo guiado com escolha de objetivo, risco, scaffold e primeiro preview.

## Evidence
P28,P29,O03

## Crates
cli, docs, templates

## Acceptance
- Usuario cria projeto Forge, ve spec minima, preview e ready sem editar YAML manualmente.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F13 Budget and Cost Accounting
body:
## Feature
Budget and Cost Accounting

## Demand
Controlar custo, rounds, model calls e tool calls.

## Product shape
Budget por run, graph node, agent, principal e tool.

## Evidence
P01,P02,P16,O03

## Crates
trace, eval, runtime

## Acceptance
- Run bloqueia ou pede confirmacao quando budget threshold e atingido.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F14 Knowledge Orchestration mode
body:
## Feature
Knowledge Orchestration mode

## Demand
Research agents precisam de fontes, claims e evidencias, nao so resumo.

## Product shape
Modo research com evidence graph, source ledger e citation checks.

## Evidence
P13,P14,P15

## Crates
memory, trace, eval

## Acceptance
- Cada claim importante aponta para source_id e evidencia local ou web registrada.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.

title: F15 Rust ergonomics and codegen track
body:
## Feature
Rust ergonomics and codegen track

## Demand
Reduzir sofrimento do agente escrevendo Rust manual repetitivo.

## Product shape
clap derive, thiserror, tracing, builders, fixtures, module split, codegen de contratos e snapshots.

## Evidence
O04,O05,O06,O07,P31,C04,C05

## Crates
todos

## Acceptance
- Novo comando ou contrato nao exige editar mais de dois pontos manuais fora de tests e docs.
- JSON output and human output exist.
- Trace integration exists when applicable.
